user.title: Volume Governor - Select Devices
user.description: Select the audio devices you want Volume Governor to manage. Only devices that support volume control are shown.

device_config.title: Configure {device_name} ({device_number}/{device_total})
device_config.description: Set up volume limits for this device. Ad-hoc mode lets you cap the volume on demand (with auto-lift). Schedule mode enforces a cap during specific hours every day. Both can be active simultaneously — the lowest cap wins.

error.no_devices_selected: You must select at least one device.

abort.already_configured: Volume Governor is already configured. Use Options to modify.
abort.no_devices_found: No audio devices with volume control found in Home Assistant.

init.title: Volume Governor - Reconfigure Devices
init.description: Select which devices to manage. Previously configured devices will retain their settings.

device_config.title: Configure {device_name} ({device_number}/{device_total})
device_config.description: Adjust volume limits for this device.

error.no_devices_selected: You must select at least one device.

abort.no_devices_found: No audio devices with volume control found in Home Assistant.
